ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., future, option, stock) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the instrument */,
  "underlying_asset" TEXT /* Underlying asset of the instrument */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market where the instrument is traded */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the instrument (for options) */,
  "contract_size" INTEGER /* Size of the contract (for futures and options) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "last_trading_date" TEXT /* Last trading date of the instrument */,
  "settlement_type" TEXT /* Type of settlement (e.g., physical, cash) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the instrument (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the exchange's official website */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone in which the exchange operates */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Hours during which the exchange is open for trading */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the market is located */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Hours during which the market is open for trading */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Default currency of the market */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_dates" (
  "trading_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading date */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* ID of the instrument being traded */,
  "trading_date" TEXT /* Date of trading */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the trading date is a holiday */,
  "is_weekend" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the trading date is a weekend */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of trading session (e.g., regular, extended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_dates_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price */,
  "trading_date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading date */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* ID of the instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* High price of the instrument on the trading date */,
  "open" REAL /* Open price of the instrument on the trading date */,
  "low" REAL /* Low price of the instrument on the trading date */,
  "close" REAL /* Close price of the instrument on the trading date */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the trading date */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous trading date */,
  "price_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous trading date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price after the market closes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_trading_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("trading_date_id") REFERENCES trading_dates ("trading_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume */,
  "trading_date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading date */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* ID of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the instrument on the trading date */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in volume from the previous trading date */,
  "volume_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in volume from the previous trading date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volumes_trading_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("trading_date_id") REFERENCES trading_dates ("trading_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volumes_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnovers" (
  "turnover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnover */,
  "trading_date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading date */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* ID of the instrument */,
  "turnover" REAL /* Turnover of the instrument on the trading date */,
  "turnover_change" REAL /* Change in turnover from the previous trading date */,
  "turnover_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in turnover from the previous trading date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnovers_trading_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("trading_date_id") REFERENCES trading_dates ("trading_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnovers_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "open_interests" (
  "open_interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each open interest */,
  "trading_date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading date */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* ID of the instrument */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest of the instrument on the trading date */,
  "open_interest_change" INTEGER /* Change in open interest from the previous trading date */,
  "open_interest_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in open interest from the previous trading date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("open_interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_open_interests_trading_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("trading_date_id") REFERENCES trading_dates ("trading_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_open_interests_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_instruments" (
  "portfolio_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio instrument */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* ID of the instrument */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio instrument was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was read by the user */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., market update, portfolio update) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the notification (e.g., system, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_levels" (
  "security_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security level */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the security level */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Level of security (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the security level was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the security level was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the security level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_levels_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
